title: Safeguard Minors from Sex-Altering Interventions
summary: Concerning safeguarding a minor from health-care interventions intended to alter the minor's biological sex.

actions.action: Introduced In House - Assigned to Health & Human Services
House Committee on Health & Human Services Postpone Indefinitely

votes.description: House Health & Human Services: Postpone House Bill 26-1087 indefinitely using a reversal of the previous roll call. There was no objection to the use of the reverse roll call, therefore, the bill was postponed indefinitely.
House Health & Human Services: Refer House Bill 26-1087 to the Committee on Finance.
